latest.title: rainbow between the mountains isn't what you think
latest.script_key: that rainbow s faking you watch the top edge it s not a full arch it s just the bottom half because the mountain blocks the other half that s why sunlight bounces off ice crystals in the air but the mountain steals the rest did you learn this wrong too
